allow: Bash(node -e "const cards = require\('./src/data/cards.json'\); ['M07','M10','M12'].forEach\(id => console.log\(id, JSON.stringify\(cards[id], null, 2\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const cards = require\('./src/data/cards.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(cards\); console.log\('Keys:', keys.slice\(0,5\), '...'\); console.log\('Type:', typeof cards\); console.log\('Is Array:', Array.isArray\(cards\)\); if\(Array.isArray\(cards\)\) { const m07 = cards.find\(c=>c.id==='M07'\); console.log\('M07:', JSON.stringify\(m07\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const raw = require\('./src/data/cards.json'\); const cards = {}; for \(const cat of Object.values\(raw.categories\)\) { if \(Array.isArray\(cat\)\) for \(const c of cat\) cards[c.id] = c; } ['M07','M10','M12'].forEach\(id => { const c = cards[id]; console.log\(id, JSON.stringify\({type:c?.type, stats:c?.stats, cost:c?.cost, abilities:c?.abilities}\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const raw = require\('./src/data/cards.json'\); console.log\('Top keys:', Object.keys\(raw\)\); if\(raw.cards\) { const c = raw.cards; console.log\('cards keys:', Object.keys\(c\).slice\(0,10\)\); ['M07','M10','M12'].forEach\(id => console.log\(id, JSON.stringify\({stats:c[id]?.stats, cost:c[id]?.cost, abilities:c[id]?.abilities}\)\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const raw = require\('./src/data/cards.json'\); const c = raw.cards; ['OS8','OS10','OS12'].forEach\(id => console.log\(id, JSON.stringify\({mw:c[id]?.stats?.mw, avail:c[id]?.stats?.avail, abilities:c[id]?.abilities}\)\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['testFilePath'].split\('tests\\\\\\\\'\)[-1], len\([t for t in f['assertionResults'] if t['status']=='passed']\)\) for f in d['testResults']]")
Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content STATUS.yaml\) -replace '206 tests passing', '209 tests passing' | Set-Content STATUS.yaml -Encoding utf8")
